needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: theorem Finset.powersetCard_eq_empty_of_lt {α : Type*} (s : Finset α) (n : ℕ) (h : Finset.card s < n) : Finset.powersetCard n s = ∅
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To show that the set of subsets of size `n` of `Fin N` is empty when `n > N`, making the sum in `e_eq_sum_prod_subsets` equal to zero.
